libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native-test runtime system properties for Netty on Java 25/native-image runs: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Use local Vert.x HTTP servers for WebClient request/response coverage; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves through Vert.x 5.0.1 to Netty 4.2.2.Final, whose code disables Unsafe by default on Java 24+ unless sun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow is set.
OAuth2WebClient examples may require optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 support; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless adding that optional dependency is intentionally in scope.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 can get meaningful coverage with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and the main artifact only, but its Netty 4.2.x runtime needs explicit Java 25/native-image unsafe-access properties for native runs.
